Video.summary: Live from Hollywood, CA on January 24, 2019, Karate Combat: Hollywood kicks off Karate Combat's sophomore season. Held at the Avalon, the former Hollywood Palace building, near the famous intersection of Hollywood and Vine. Elhadji Ndour v. Calum Robb.
Video.grandparentTitle: KARATE COMBAT: HOLLYWOOD - Elhadji Ndour v. Calum Robb

Video.summary: A private pre-season event held in a secret warehouse in Budapest, Hungary, the inaugural Karate Combat: Genesis event took place on February 3, 2018. The event showcases the incredible depth of the fight roster highlighting many karate legends in various weight classes, competing for the first time ever in this new sporting league.
Video.grandparentTitle: KARATE COMBAT: GENESIS - Reda Messaoudi vs. Luiz Rocha
Video.title: KARATE COMBAT: GENESIS - Reda Messaoudi vs. Luiz Rocha

Video.summary: Coaches in fight sport are at times an underrated but yet intergral part of an athlete's success. What makes them give up their day, weeks and years to help their fighters be the best in the world? This episode features Fransisco Azevendo as we delve into the life of a coach.
Video.grandparentTitle: Day in the Life of a Coach - Francisco Azevedo
Video.title: Day in the Life of a Coach - Francisco Azevedo

Image.alt: Day in the Life of a Coach - Francisco Azevedo
Day in the Life of a Coach - Francisco Azevedo
Day in the Life of a Coach - Francisco Azevedo

Video.summary: Hard Knocks 45 continues to bring you some of the best fights in MMA! This episode features matchups between amateur debut fighters Abbas Faleh vs. Tarren Gallamore and strikers Les Bisson vs. Gerra Gossen. The last fight of the night is an exciting Lightweight pro bout between Wolfgang Janssen and Craig Shintani. You do not want to skip this one!
Video.grandparentTitle: Fight Vault - HK45 - Episode 3
Video.title: Fight Vault - HK45 - Episode 3

Image.alt: Fight Vault - HK45 - Episode 3
Fight Vault - HK45 - Episode 3
Fight Vault - HK45 - Episode 3

Video.summary: Chris Kaminesky v. Damien DiMarco - HKF
Video.grandparentTitle: Finish of the Day - Chris Kaminesky v. Damien DiMarco - HKFC
Video.title: Finish of the Day - Chris Kaminesky v. Damien DiMarco - HKFC

Image.alt: Finish of the Day - Chris Kaminesky v. Damien DiMarco - HKFC
Finish of the Day - Chris Kaminesky v. Damien DiMarco - HKFC
Finish of the Day - Chris Kaminesky v. Damien DiMarco - HKFC

Video.summary: Hard Knocks 46 opens with a rare treat: a ladies pro match between champions in differening disciplines, both looking to make their transition to MMA. Lindsay Garbatt is a former World Champion in Boxing while Valeria Mejia is a Pan-American Champion in Sambo. Following this is the main event of the evening, a challenge for the vacant Bantamweight title between Jesse Arnett and Dimitri Waardenburg! You do not want to miss this!
Video.grandparentTitle: Fight Vault - HK46 - Episode 1
Video.title: Fight Vault - HK46 - Episode 1

Image.alt: Fight Vault - HK46 - Episode 1
Fight Vault - HK46 - Episode 1
Fight Vault - HK46 - Episode 1

Video.summary: Jess Elverum and Jenn Wolstenholme go to battle next week...before you see their fight, pick your side! See what daily life is like for these two female athletes to decide who you'll be cheering for when they step in to the cage.

Video.summary: A private pre-season event held in a secret warehouse in Budapest, Hungary, the inaugural Karate Combat: Genesis event took place on February 3, 2018. The event showcases the incredible depth of the fight roster highlighting many karate legends in various weight classes, competing for the first time ever in this new sporting league.

Video.summary: Hard Knocks 45 opens with a pro match between always threatening Zach Manywounds and Trenton Rowell, hungry for his first win. Following is Keegan ""the Condition"" Oliver vs. Hard Knocks newcomer, Vaz Lep. The main event of the evening is welterweight matchup between two exciting Hard Knocks veterans: Joel Powell vs. Adam Smith.
Video.grandparentTitle: Fight Vault - HK45 - Episode 1
Video.title: Fight Vault - HK45 - Episode 1

Image.alt: Fight Vault - HK45 - Episode 1
Fight Vault - HK45 - Episode 1
Fight Vault - HK45 - Episode 1

Video.summary: Hard Knocks 45 continues with some hard hitting action in MMA! This episode features an amateur matchup between Joe Mapanda and debut Sheldon Williams. Following are pros Dusty Kramps vs. former Hard Knocks Amateur Champion, Devon Smith. Our final fight for the evening is a pro bout between dynamic fighters Justin Schmit and Vyron Phillips.
Video.grandparentTitle: Fight Vault - HK45 - Episode 2
Video.title: Fight Vault - HK45 - Episode 2

Image.alt: Fight Vault - HK45 - Episode 2
Fight Vault - HK45 - Episode 2

Enfusion - Episode 63

Video.summary: Coming from a history of drinking heavily and drug abuse, Nick Burnham was able to turn his life around completely by prioritizing his MMA training. Now, at HK38, Nick is looking to take the Lightweight title away from Dauda Keita in a fight that goes the distance!
Video.grandparentTitle: Out of the Cage - Nick Burnham
Video.title: Out of the Cage - Nick Burnham

Image.alt: Out of the Cage - Nick Burnham
Out of the Cage - Nick Burnham
Out of the Cage - Nick Burnham

Best of 'Shock N Awe' Finishes
Best of 'Shock N Awe' Finishes

Video.summary: Coaches in fight sport are at times an underrated but yet intergral part of an athlete's success. What makes them give up their day, weeks and years to help their fighters be the best in the world? This episode features Jaclyn Madarasz as we delve into the life of a coach.
Video.grandparentTitle: Day in the Life of a Coach - Jaclyn Madarasz
Video.title: Day in the Life of a Coach - Jaclyn Madarasz

Image.alt: Day in the Life of a Coach - Jaclyn Madarasz
Day in the Life of a Coach - Jaclyn Madarasz
Day in the Life of a Coach - Jaclyn Madarasz
